name: IHG One Rewards Traveler Credit Card

verdict.text: Free IHG points earner, upgraded with World Elite perks in 2025

earn_rates.category: Dining, utilities, select streaming & gas stations

earn_note: 2× on general spend is unusually strong for a no-fee card, and the 3× bucket (dining, utilities, streaming, gas) is broad enough to hit most months. The Premier card earns faster at IHG hotels (10× vs 5×) and on travel broadly (5× vs 3×), but this card asks nothing back for it.

points.note: Same IHG One Rewards currency as the Premier card — NerdWallet valued points around 0.6¢ in 2026. This card just earns it for free, without the Premier's anniversary free night certificate or Platinum status. Never transfer to airlines; the ~5:1 ratio guts the value.

transfer_partners.highlight: IHG One Rewards transfers to roughly 34 airline partners, mostly at a 5:1 ratio (5,000 IHG points → 1,000 miles) — transfers must be initiated by phone, not online.
transfer_partners.recent_changes: No confirmed recent changes to the airline transfer chart.

credits.name: Annual Spend Bonus
credits.subtitle: 10,000 pts · after $10,000/yr spend
credits.description: 10,000 bonus IHG One Rewards points each calendar year you spend at least $10,000 on the card.
tips: Only count this if you're already going to hit $10,000/yr — the points aren't worth chasing the spend on their own.

credits.name: Instacart Credit
credits.subtitle: $10/mo · up to $120/yr · + 3-mo Instacart+
credits.description: A complimentary 3-month Instacart+ trial plus up to $10 in monthly Instacart credits (through Dec 31, 2027). Requires an active Instacart+ membership to receive the monthly credit.
tips: Remember to cancel Instacart+ after the trial if you don't want to keep paying for it.
$0 to you if you don't already grocery-shop through Instacart.

credits.name: DoorDash DashPass + Credit
credits.subtitle: 12-mo complimentary + $10/qtr non-restaurant · thru 2027
credits.description: One year of complimentary DashPass membership (DoorDash and Caviar) plus up to $10 off quarterly on non-restaurant DoorDash orders, both active through December 31, 2027.
tips: Requires activation and payment with this card at checkout to earn the quarterly credit.

credits.name: 4th Reward Night Free
credits.subtitle: on 4+ consecutive award nights, same property
credits.description: On any reward-night stay of 4 or more consecutive nights at the same property, the 4th night is free (unlimited redemptions per year).
tips: Only pays off on award stays already 4+ nights long — not a general-purpose credit.
$100 here is a rough single-stay estimate.

insurance.detail: Theft & collision, secondary to personal insurance in the US

protection_note: Unusually complete protections for a $0 card — trip cancellation and rental car coverage are both present, a direct result of the 2025 upgrade to Mastercard World Elite. Limits still trail the paid Premier and any premium travel card.
rental_note: Secondary coverage for theft and collision — decline the counter's CDW and pay with this card, but use a card with primary coverage if you rent often.

status_perks.name: IHG One Rewards Silver Elite Status
status_perks.note: Complimentary with the card for as long as you hold it — a light welcome amenity and modest bonus points. Gold Elite unlocks after $20,000 in card spend per calendar year.

services.name: No foreign transaction fees
services.detail: Zero FX fees on international spend.

services.name: Mastercard World Elite Benefits
services.detail: Lyft ride credits, Booking.com prepaid-stay discounts (up to 7% off), Zero Liability protection, and other World Elite Mastercard perks — added July 24, 2025.

services.name: Points purchase discount
services.detail: 20% off when buying IHG One Rewards points directly with this card.

additional_cards.title: Authorized Users

benefits.text: Free to add, plus a 10,000-point bonus for adding one within 3 months of account opening
Earns IHG One Rewards points on their spend (into your account)
Does not get their own Silver status independently

additional_cards.note: Authorized users are free, and adding one within the first 3 months earns an extra 10,000-point bonus on top of the welcome offer.

timeline.text: Card network upgraded from standard Mastercard to Mastercard World Elite for new and existing cardholders — added Lyft, Booking.com, and other World Elite perks on top of the existing IHG earning structure, with no fee change.
Instacart ($10/mo credit + 3-month Instacart+ trial) and DashPass benefits added, active through Dec 31, 2027.
IHG Rewards Club program and cards rebranded to IHG One Rewards.
